'''Lilit Twoseas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Most notably, Twoseas was the master of the famed Jedi [[K'Kruhk]], one of the few Jedi to escape the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and the rise of the [[One Sith]] in [[137 ABY]].

==Biography==
Lilit Twoseas was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], in which she [[Jedi Trials/Legends|ascended]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and took the [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] [[K'Kruhk]] as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] apprentice.<ref name="AOW" />

Twoseas and her student volunteered to accompany the [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]], [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], on a perilous journey from the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the [[Yinchorri system]] to quell the [[Yinchorri Uprising|pan-galactic uprising]] plaguing the region. The Jedi separated into three teams, with Twoseas joining [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Councilors]] [[Micah Giiett]] and [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] to located the rumored [[Yinchorri command center|command center]] on the planet [[Yibikkoror]]. When their ship came under fire, the Jedi crash-landed on a lone [[Yibikkoror floating city|floating city]] and began to spread out in search of the command center. Deducing that it was not located on Yibikkoror, the Jedi called for [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Eeth Koth/Legends|Eeth Koth's]] team to rescue them, as they came under [[Mission to Yibikkoror|siege]] by [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] warriors.<ref name="AOW" />

[[File:LillitDead.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Twoseas' corpse is cradled by her Padawan, K'Kruhk and Master Mace Windu.]]

Safely aboard Koth's shuttle, the Jedi team headed to [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] to assist Master Windu's team. On the ground, Twoseas and her Padawan [[Battle of Yinchorr (Yinchorri Uprising)|engaged]] the enemy, fighting their way to their besieged comrades. As they regrouped and headed back to their escape shuttle, K'Kruhk was surrounded by Yinchorri and would have soon been overwhelmed. Unable to standby and do nothing, Twoseas dove into the conflict and jumped in front of a blade meant for the Whiphid's heart. The blade pierced her shoulder, as a second impaled her chest. Picking up her blood-covered form, K'Kruhk and the other Jedi fled to the ship and departed the world.<ref name="AOW" />

After the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] destroyed the control center and silenced the rebels, the Jedi returned with their fallen comrades to the Temple of Coruscant. Escorting Twoseas' body on a hover-gurney, K'Kruhk took his deceased Master into the Temple where it would lie in state until being [[Jedi funeral/Legends|cremated]] on the [[Jedi Temple Pyre room|Temple's pyre]].<ref name="AOW" />
